subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps, spoken on 1917-06-07
subcodes.first_line: The [animal] spirit will not become human spirit, nor will vegetable spirit become animal spirit. Existence is one, as it appears in every grade, according to the exigency of that grade.
subcodes.subjects: @composition and decomposition, @unity of existence [wahdatu'l-wujud], @unity; oneness of humanity, @contention and conflict, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @need for cooperation; solitary existence not possible
